Surface.role: The one core of the PND Collection System: a single OpenZeppelin ERC721 that holds ownership, ETH payment paths, and per-token provenance, and nothing else.

SurfaceFactory.role: SurfaceFactory deploys one [Surface](/docs/collections/contracts/surface) per work as an immutable EIP-1167 clone of a fixed implementation: no proxy admin, no upgrade path, what deploys is what runs.

RenderAssets.role: The renderer-land registry of static display assets: each collection's shared cover image, per-token captures (thumbnails of rendered output), and a capture template that resolves per token id.

ScriptyRenderer.role: ScriptyRenderer is the **bring-your-own generative renderer template**: a concrete, forkable [IRenderer](/docs/collections/contracts/i-renderer) for Art Blocks-style script-based work, assembled fully onchain through ScriptyBuilderV2.

AllowlistHook.role: A reference [mint hook](/docs/collections/contracts/i-mint-hook) gating minting to a Merkle allowlist, the standard shape for a presale.

PerWalletCapHook.role: A reference [mint hook](/docs/collections/contracts/i-mint-hook) capping how many tokens any single wallet can mint from a collection, so a capped drop can't be bought out by one address in a single transaction (or across several).

HoldsSurfaceHook.role: A reference [mint hook](/docs/collections/contracts/i-mint-hook) gating a mint on the minter holding a token from another collection, typically an earlier collection by the same artist.

GateHook.role: A reference [mint hook](/docs/collections/contracts/i-mint-hook) composing a Merkle allowlist and a per-wallet cap into ONE hook.

IMintHook.role: IMintHook is the interface a contract implements to occupy a collection's hook slot, one of the [four swappable slots](/docs/collections/concepts/four-slots) on the [Collection](/docs/collections/contracts/collection) core.

IPriceStrategy.role: IPriceStrategy is the interface a contract implements to occupy a collection's price slot, one of the [four swappable slots](/docs/collections/concepts/four-slots) on the [Collection](/docs/collections/contracts/collection) core.

IRenderer.role: IRenderer is the interface a contract implements to occupy a collection's renderer slot, one of the [four swappable slots](/docs/collections/concepts/four-slots) on the [Surface](/docs/collections/contracts/surface) core.

ISurfaceView.role: ISurfaceView is the read surface a collection exposes for its swappable slots, [renderer](/docs/collections/contracts/i-renderer), [price strategy](/docs/collections/contracts/i-price-strategy), and any minter, to read without depending on the full [Surface](/docs/collections/contracts/surface) ABI.

IPreviewRenderer.role: IPreviewRenderer is an OPTIONAL extension a renderer implements to render what a token WOULD look like for a caller-supplied seed, without any token existing.

SovereignAuctionHouse.role: An onchain English auction house for ERC721 tokens, denominated in ETH.

SovereignAuctionHouseFactory.role: SovereignAuctionHouseFactory deploys one [SovereignAuctionHouse](/docs/auctions/contracts/sovereign-auction-house) per owner as an immutable EIP-1167 clone of a fixed implementation: no proxy admin, no upgrade path, what deploys is what runs.
